title: Episode 4: Messy Mahjong
summary: Join Tina and Michelle as they get Messy! This episode dives into Messy Mahjong; a more casual variation of the game that's perfect for laid-back play or if youвАЩre looking to fit a quick game into your schedule. The hosts humorously break down how it works, what makes it different, and the pros and cons of Messy Mahjong.

summary: The best cards from Final Fantasy x Magic: the Gathering!

title: The Game That WonвАЩt Let Me Go вАУ OUTBOUND Reflections | Best Gaming Podcast
summary: Settle in for a slow-burning deep dive into the surreal, enigmatic, and often unsettling world of OUTBOUND a game thatвАЩs part walking simulator, part psychological riddle, and entirely unforgettable. In this episode, I share my raw, reflective experience of wandering through its photorealistic ruins, wrestling with cryptic puzzles, and decoding its ambiguous narrative. We explore what works (the immersive sound design, haunting visuals, and emotional resonance), what frustrates (the pacing, bugs, and lack of direction), and what lingers long after the credits roll. If youвАЩre into games that feel like dreams you canвАЩt quite shake, this oneвАЩs for you. Think Myst meets David Lynch, with a healthy dose of existential dread.

title: Rebellion: вАЬWe donвАЩt gamble wildly. WeвАЩve a responsibility to our peopleвАЭ
summary: In this episode, we catch up with Jason Kingsley, the CEO of Atomfall and Sniper Elite developer Rebellion. In this chat, we learn about the firm's unique approach to market research, the responsibility it has to not being reckless with game budgets, and what comes next after Game Pass hit Atomfall draws in 1.5m players.     This is a public episode. If you would like to discuss this with other subscribers or get access to bonus episodes, visit www.thegamebusiness.com

title: Bonus Episode! GM, GM Session 0 - The Stories We Tell
summary: Bonus episode time! title: Episode 22 - Horror in Actual Play with Gannon Reedy!
summary: EPISODE SUMMARY James is joined by Gannon Reedy in a discussion about time constraints in actual play, especially when it comes to combat. title: 126 Changed Stars | Strive for a better future together on the Frontier
summary: Take on xenophobic separatists, cut throat criminals, lethal machines, and otherworldly predators as you strive for a better future together on the Frontier. ¬† Changed Stars¬†is a sci-fi roleplaying game set in a bright-yet-perilous future. Inspired by utopian feminist science fiction and contemporary gritty speculative futures, Changed Stars presents a modern-take on a post-patriarchal society for the players to navigate. ¬† The game features a unique d6 system. On a test only a single 6 is necessary to achieve Success, but multiple 6s may be used to Twist. There is also the Edge pool, a push-your-luck mechanic that helps you succeed will adding additional complications to the heat of the moment. ¬† Buy the game: https://dieselshot.itch.io/changedstars ¬† Social: https://bsky.app/profile/dieselshot.bsky.social ¬† Discord: https://discord.gg/GSc4swY9wk ¬† Crowdfunder: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/dieselshot/changedstars

title: SPECIAL EPISODE: Galactic with Ify Nwadiwe, Nala J. Wu, Dusty Hill, and Catrina Dennis [Episode 1 - Worldbuilding]
summary: INTRODUCING: A bonus two-part series (with a full group!) to coincide with the crowdfund campaign for Galactic and Going Rogue! I sat down with an incredible table of performers, including Ify Nwadiwe, Nala J. Wu, Dusty Hill, and Catrina Dennis to weave a story of rebellion and relationships in space. In part one, we make our characters and build our galaxy--stay tuned for part 2 on 6/2 where we see our heroes dive into action! You can find the Galactic & Going Rogue crowdfunder here on Kickstarter, going live May 20th: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/galacticgoingrogue/galactic-and-going-rogue-two-ttrpgs-of-war-among-the-stars?ref=8lwj2g If youвАЩre listening to this on the 19th, itвАЩs not too late to sign up for the crowdfunderвАЩs BackerKit mailing list here, then get a free PDF of Jess LevineвАЩs satirical scifi skirmish storytelling TTRPG PLANET FIST when you back the Galactic & Going Rogue Kickstarter in its first 24 hours: http://backerkit.com/call_to_action/eda53ff9-b09c-422f-8036-2dbc62b83557/landing?ref=po1ep1 This episode was produced by Jess Levine (@jessfrom.online on Bluesky) and edited and coproduced by satah (@posatahchips.gaygothvibes.online on Bluesky). title: No Switch 2 Launch Reviews? Next-Gen Xbox Using ARM + The "Forced RT" Debate!
summary: In this week's Direct, Rich, John and Alex discuss the strongly rumoured plans for NO Switch 2 launch reviews, along with apparent news that the next-gen Xbox will use ARM-based Snapdragon processors. Rich tests out our in-development VRR capture/analysis tools with Days Gone Remastered, measures the ongoing PS5 VRR stutter effect while Alex shares his excitement for Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Shadows disclosures. title: 247: Shadowcat (Katherine "Kitty" Pryde)
podcast_name: Fury's Finest: A Marvel Crisis Protocol Podcast
summary: In this episode we cover Kitty Pryde, Shadowcat. First, we chronologically cover the character's comic book and movie history in our Lore segment. After Lore, we discuss the character's stats, play style, tactic cards, and team roster in our Strategy section. We finish the episode with a strategy discussion on the character's tactic cards, and how well the character fits on other teams in Marvel Crisis Protocol. title: #334: Nothing's Done It Better
summary: Well, we finally did it. We played CATAN, and it was ... good! And then we started wondering, is there anything that's done quite the same thing that that game is doing? And then that got us wondering how many games there are like that, where it's genuinely hard to say that nothing has done it better since. And then that got us wondering if, instead of all this wondering, we should record a podcast episode. title: Ep 6 - Echoes of the Frost
summary: Join the Hintertalk! We are newcomers to the world of podcast adventures. All of us are neurodivergent, which puts a creative spin on things. The DM has strong ties to the LGBTQ+ community, which we all support. Our equipment is basic at this point, as we gather from all across the global, from the Gold Coast to the East Coast, using nothing but Discord to link us. ¬†Having faced spectral horrors, our heroes seek a moment of respite in the desolate Frostbitten Wastes, where a frozen figure sparks somber memories. Amidst the chilling landscape, an anomalous vibrant flower hints at unseen mysteries, soon replaced by a terrifying encounter with creatures lurking in the darkness. Will this brief calm be shattered into deeper nightmare? Listen now to follow their harrowing journey!¬† Thanks for listening. Until next time, be kind to yourself, and the world around you.  Role of the Dice @roleofthedice.bsky.social, & Spotify, Apple, IHeartRadio, and YouTube Story Adapted from the works of Luke Hart & DMLairMagazine https://www.thedmslair.com/ Music by Ethan Airhart, FantasyCraft @fantasycraft.bsky.social, and Tabletop Audio https://www.tabletopaudio.com/ Graphics by Homebru @ebargenda.bsky.social

title: 54: Intro to Bretonnian Society | Warhammer Old World Lore
podcast_name: Warhammer Old World: Laying Down The Lore
summary: We continue our cultural introduction to Bretonnia with a view of their relations with other human nations and the Wood Elves of Athel Loren. We then turn to the seas to look at their naval power, ports and their claim to be the greatest sailors in the Old World. Feudal Hierarchy of Bretonnia from the noble ranks of knights to the role (and miserable lot) of Bretonnian serfs. We close out the episode with a dive into the sumptuary laws that the Nobles use to control the serfs and the roles and traditions that protect/oppress the noble women of the land. title: The Divide: Classic vs. Retail WoW Debates
podcast_name: Pig & Whistle Tales - A World of Warcraft Podcast
summary: Praises or critics can be send here! Also if there's anything you wish to hear about please send your requests here! Contradictory player opinions about Classic and Retail WoW reveal fundamental disconnects between what players claim they want and what they actually enjoy. вАҐ Classic players simultaneously demand "no changes" while requesting quality-of-life improvements вАҐ Season of Discovery controversy highlights player confusionвАФit maintains Classic gameplay while adding QoL features вАҐ Class balance in Classic is objectively poor with fury warriors dominating, yet purists resist improvements вАҐ Perfect balance is impossible in MMOs while maintaining meaningful class identity вАҐ Returning Retail players complain about complexity without specific examples вАҐ Modern WoW's questing is actually more streamlined than ever with clear guidance вАҐ Gear and crafting systems in Retail are straightforward when explained properly вАҐ The WoW community often makes sweeping generalizations without nuanced understanding of game design Check out all my socials down below and visit my Etsy shop for WoW-related merchandise! Hope you all enjoy and hope you relate to any of these stories. And I will speak to you all in the next episode! title: 172: Locked Dungeon Door Feedback
summary: I get feedback from Jason and Riley about the locked dungeon door. I'm pondering a classic D&D moment: the dreaded locked door and the failed lock pick. I share my thoughts on why I think it's the latter, and throw the question out to you all вАУ what do you think happens when your party hits an unyielding lock? title: Ep 4 - Chieftain Cosmo'Tor
summary: Join the Hintertalk! We are newcomers to the world of podcast adventures. All of us are neurodivergent, which puts a creative spin on things. The DM has strong ties to the LGBTQ+ community, which we all support. Our equipment is basic at this point, as we gather from all across the global, from the Gold Coast to the East Coast, using nothing but Discord to link us. ¬†In the healing embrace of Frostglen, scarred heroes grapple with lost memories and a newfound bond forged in battle. A spiritual encounter with Chieftain Cosmo'Tor reveals otherworldly origins and a shared destiny tied to the aurora-filled sky. Now, tasked with finding missing children in the perilous southern caves, they must embrace this new purpose under the vast wilderness. Will they uncover the truth of their past while facing the dangers ahead? Listen to find out!¬† Thanks for listening. Until next time, be kind to yourself, and the world around you. title: вАЭWe're Still Nuts!вАЭ | A Mental Health Awareness Week Special 2025
podcast_name: Warhammer Old World: Laying Down The Lore
summary: In this episode, we take another short break from the lore of the Fated Place and instead deal with our own trials and tribulations by exposing our mental gribblies and the gribblies of some of our dear friends. To celebrate this year's Mental Health Awareness Week theme, we're discussing all things community, the people the prop us up and the groups that encourage us to share and move forward when our will to do so wanes. If you are struggling with any sort of mental health issue, just know you are not alone. We and millions like us are in exactly the same boat and there is always someone you can talk to.¬† To start with, you can join the Miniature's Apothecaries: Miniature's Apothecaries Discord For more info on Mental Health Awareness, see the following links: вБ†Mental Health Foundation UKвБ† вБ†Rethink Mental Illness UKвБ† вБ†Mental Health EuropeвБ† вБ†Nation Alliance of Mental Illness USAвБ† вБ†Mental Health AmericaвБ† вБ†Canadian Mental Health AssociationвБ† вБ†Government of CanadaвБ† вБ†Worldwide Mental Health FoundationвБ† If you don't see an organisation in this list that operates in your area, just google 'mental health awareness week' and you'll find some local organisations that can help.¬†¬† Be safe people, much love,Dar, Cral & Ben x

title: Teaching RPGs and Safety Tools - Consultation with Fiona
summary: Episode Notes In this episode, we ask our consulting expert Fiona of the What am I Rolling? podcast (and many other podcasts) about a variety of topics, including techniques to help teach new RPGs to players new and old, some best-practice methods to promote accessibility and using safety tools in RPGs, as well as improv techniques which can help players and GMs. You can find a link to Fiona's awesome lines and veils spreadsheet in our lab's google drive here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1b2HEKM7Qi88rgFJpNfwjwPvqHfExw0B6IN6NKY9xih4/edit?usp=sharing so you can make a copy for yourself You can find more of Fiona's stuff via the WAIR podcast website and YouTube channel All music and sound effects are sourced under attribution-free creative commons licensing. This podcast is powered by Pinecast.

title: Full Throttle Fiasco вАУ The Wreckfest 2 Review
summary: Strap in and hold on tight as we crash headlong into the high-octane, steel-twisting madness of Wreckfest 2. In this episode, we take a no-holds-barred look at the long-awaited sequel to the cult classic demolition racer. From the visceral satisfaction of improved damage modeling to the wild variety of vehicles and events (yes, there's a rocket-powered sofa), we break down everything that makes this game a chaotic masterpiece. Whether you're into strategic wreckage or just want to watch the world burn one fender at a time this episode delivers the full throttle experience. WeвАЩre not just reviewing the game; weвАЩre throwing it into the wall and seeing whatвАЩs left standing.

title: This вАЬSimpleвАЭ Poker Strategy Is Making You a Fish
podcast_name: The Official Red Chip Poker Podcast
summary: Poker is already a complex gameвАФbut many players try to make it easier by using simplified poker strategies. Whether itвАЩs range c-betting 1/3 pot, 3-bet-only from the small blind, or avoiding donk bets entirely, the goal is always the same: reduce decisions & reduce errors. But is simplifying your strategy actually helping your win rate? Or is it quietly costing you chips?  In this episode of the Red Chip Poker Podcast, we explore the real trade-offs behind simplified poker strategies, their relationship to GTO solver output, and the critical distinction between playing GTO and playing exploitatively. This is a must-listen for serious players diving into solvers and anyone questioning whether "just keeping it simple" is the right approach.  рЯФН YouвАЩll learn:    What simplified poker strategies really are (and what theyвАЩre not)    How EV loss in solvers is often misunderstood    Why simplified strategies may shift complexity to later streets    The #1 mistake players make when comparing GTO models    When simplification actually makes senseвАФespecially from an exploitative lens.  **LINKS**  ¬Ј GTO Gems 2 Poker Book: https://redchippoker.com/gto-gems-2-book  ¬Ј Crushing GTO Poker: https://youtu.be/j8cFt86B8To  ¬Ј EV Poker Formula: https://www.splitsuit.com/simple-poker-expected-value-formula  **JOIN US ON DISCORD**  Join us on Discord today: https://redchippoker.com/discord

title: 125 Frostpunk | The Tabletop Roleplaying Game based on the award-winning Frostpunk video games
summary: Frostpunk, the Tabletop Roleplaying Game based on the award-winning Frostpunk video games ¬† The cold is unrelenting. It's been ten years since the end of the world. Cities depend on massive generators that provide heat, and machinery that excavates resources and grows food. Humans scramble to survive, relying on the pillars of Faith and Order to build societies that can keep residents alive despite the odds. You have skills to contribute to the cityвАФbut can you make the difficult choices needed for survival? ¬† Frostpunk, the Tabletop Roleplaying Game, based on the award-winning Frostpunk video games, uses CatalystвАЩs new medium-weight roleplaying Dice Core system. Join us this week as Jason M. Hardy tells us all about the project. ¬† Kickstarter: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/cgl/frostpunk-the-roleplaying-game Website: catalystgamelabs.com Warm Flesh actual play: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vQK9igBQf6w

This week, weвАЩre looking at how to get the MOST out of your Tarkir Dragonstorm drafts. When Boros or Temur are open, itвАЩs smooth sailing ahead, but what happens when youвАЩre at a table where the best decks are contested? title: 246: Iceman (Bobby Drake)
podcast_name: Fury's Finest: A Marvel Crisis Protocol Podcast
summary: In this episode we cover Bobby Drake, Iceman. First, we chronologically cover the character's comic book and movie history in our Lore segment. After Lore, we discuss the character's stats, play style, tactic cards, and team roster in our Strategy section. We finish the episode with a strategy discussion on the character's tactic cards, and how well the character fits on other teams in Marvel Crisis Protocol. title: C2 - Ep21: A Cult of Chaos Revealed
summary: Jace, Holden, Dail, and Lucia continue their exploration of the mysterious overgrown shrine.Our party returns to the foreboding shrine, as they cautiously approach, the imposing figure of Nash looms in their memories. The team sets on their investigation, encountering traces of cultist activities and mysterious symbols. Navigate the suspenseful corridors of mystery and watch as they strategize to handle the threats ahead, all while piecing together the clues left behind. Are our adventurers ready to confront Brynmark and uncover the deeper secrets of the cult lurking within the shrine? Tune in for another gripping chapter in the world of Dungeons & Dragons with Twenty Sides. Let the adventure continue! Want more Twenty Sides? Check the links below. title: 152 - The Best Of Bot Bops
summary: On this episode of ClueLess, the Bot, from our recurring game Bot Bops, has sent Elliott and Sean on some impossible errands while she presents a compilation of her best Bops. ElliottвАЩs non-branded digital assistant has been programmed to sing some very famous songs, but she is not programmed for melody, harmony, rhythm, or anything else that makes music a pleasurable experience. See if you can guess these songs and the artist before Sean and his guests! ¬† New episodes every Monday and Thursday. Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman, Josh Richmond, and Devon Torrey Bryant. ClueLess scripts by Elliott Kalan. The BotвАЩs script by Devon Torrey Bryant. Music and sound effects by Devon Torrey Bryant.

title: EP53: He-ManвАЩs Greatest Hits, Public Pool Memories, Hypercolor Tees, and AlfвАЩs Unfinished Goodbye!
summary: WeвАЩre back with another nostalgia-packed episode of Super Retro Podcast! This time, weвАЩre ranking the Top 10 He-Man Action Figures of All TimeвАФthe ones you fought your friends over back in the day. From the mighty He-Man himself to the sinister Skeletor, weвАЩre bringing Eternia back to life. But thatвАЩs just scratching the surface: ¬†вАҐ Remember those endless summers at the Public Pool? Chlorine-soaked hair, that banging snack bar pizza, and the ultimate test of braveryвАФthe high dive. ¬†вАҐ WeвАЩre taking you back to the days of Hypercolor T-Shirts, the shirts that let everyone know just how sweaty you were. ¬†вАҐ ALFвАЩs Heartbreaking Goodbye вАУ Why NBC decided to leave us hanging is still one of the greatest TV crimes of all time. ¬†вАҐ Reading the Cereal Box вАУ Because breakfast wasnвАЩt complete without knowing how many grams of sugar you were about to consume. ¬†вАҐ The epic sounds of Castlevania BloodlinesвАФhands down some of the best Genesis music ever composed. ¬†вАҐ Those legendary Midnight Game Drops where sleep was optional and that new game smell was worth the wait. ¬†вАҐ WeвАЩre digging into Epic Mailbags, Discord Drops, and Fanmail to see what you, the Super Retro community, had to say. Today's episode was brought to you by Salty Water. Hydrate Your Inner Warrior!¬† www.drinksaltywater.com¬† Master list on our NES collection: https://superretropod.com/nes-game-list-super-retro/ Join our channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMP4yO-dFGayGUkT_MVYrhQ/join  Discord: https://discord.gg/MYXnh9pf  Email: SuperRetroPod@gmail.com Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/superretropodcast/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@superretropod All things Super Retro: https://linktr.ee/superretro Video episodes available at YouTube!

title: Just Riffin'
summary: Sometimes you just gotta shoot the breeze, ya know? This week on the Vintage RPG Podcast, it's a little bit of this and a little bit of that. There's Stu's new radio show, Games People Play (co-hosting with Unwinnable's own Sara Clemens)! There's Hambone's reaction to Sinners! There's the Rifts calendar! There's the Warriors of the Galaxy play set with sound effects box!  * * *  Check out the debut broadcast of Games People Play in the WFMU archives! title: Ep.81 Welsh Nationals & V3 Meta | Bolt Action Podcast
summary: In this special two-year anniversary episode of Tabletop Tommies, Jonny and Phil return to their roots by revisiting the Welsh Nationals once more. Join them as they delve into the current state of the meta, particularly the dominance of armored warfare in V3 of the game. With five intense rounds behind them, they share insights from their games and what this means for future competitive play. The duo reflects on the effectiveness of different strategies, highlighting the shift towards tank-centric tactics and armored transports. Are they truly the key to victory, or is there room for other play styles? Jonny and Phil discuss their personal experiences, including compelling battles and tactical decisions, offering listeners a detailed analysis of the competitive scene. Tune in for a comprehensive breakdown of nations represented, player strategies, and what the results from Welsh Nationals suggest about the evolving landscape of the game. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the competitive scene, this episode is packed with valuable insights and light-hearted banter. ¬† Want to support the channel? title: WoW Perspectives: Exploring the Best Zones, Characters, and Leveling Experiences
podcast_name: Pig & Whistle Tales - A World of Warcraft Podcast
summary: Praises or critics can be send here! Also if there's anything you wish to hear about please send your requests here! The Pig and Whistle Tales from Azeroth podcast explores personal favorites in World of Warcraft, from beloved zones to iconic characters, while sharing weekly game updates and nostalgic memories. вАҐ Weekly news update includes world bosses Orta and The Godfather in Azka'het вАҐ Undermined Delves bonus event offers more loot this week вАҐ Deepwing Dunk brawl transforms Deepwing Gorge into a basketball match вАҐ Teldrassil stands as favorite zone due to its music, ambience, and personal connection вАҐ Starting zones perfectly capture each race's identity and culture вАҐ The infamous "Wetlands Run" between starting zones created lasting memories вАҐ Arthas represents the perfect villain with his complete character arc вАҐ Icecrown Citadel's progressive storytelling made for an immersive raid experience вАҐ The Shadowmourne questline provided emotional closure for characters impacted by the Lich King вАҐ Classic and Retail WoW offer distinctly different leveling experiences вАҐ Upcoming Lorewalker Cho content promises to enhance the leveling experience with meaningful lore Check out all the socials below and visit the Etsy shop for new items. title: Swing, Miss, or Home Run + MLB The Show 25 in Depth | Best Gaming Podcast
summary: In this episode, weвАЩre taking a deep dive into MLB The Show 25 and weвАЩre not just talking about new features and shiny graphics. From tighter hitting mechanics to a smarter, more punishing pitching system, this yearвАЩs game is all about nuance and challenge. I break down whatвАЩs working, whatвАЩs frustrating, and where this game sits in the lineup of The ShowвАЩs legacy. We get into everything: Hitting that finally rewards precision Pitching mechanics that force real strategy Fielding, baserunning, and new sliding tech Franchise mode improvements (hello, better scouting!) Diamond DynastyвАЩs eternal battle with microtransactions Road to the Show's story tweaks and grind factor Whether you're a vet of the series or considering jumping in for the first time, IвАЩve got the full scouting report to help you decide if itвАЩs worth stepping up to the plate this year.

title: Episode 72 - Ray and Lee of the Posties Deliver on Salute
podcast_name: Yarkshire Gamers Reet Big Wargames Podcast
summary: Welcome to the Show and today I have a couple of guests on the show who I have known for a few years via the Analogue Hobbies Winter Paint Challenge (see Episode 18 for more). Ray Rousell and Big Lee Hadley have been around the hobby for many years, both running successful wargaming blogs, with Lee branching off into the world of the Utubes in recent years, having his popular question of the week videos every Sunday. As usual we start with a bit of an introduction and general game chat before using the second part of the show to discuss the Posties Rejects group that both Ray and Lee belong to. After the usual mayhem of the Quiz we get down to an in depth discussion of the recent Salute 52 Wargames Show down in that there London. This is a really fun episode with a couple of great guys who have a similar outlook on the hobby to me, hope you enjoy it. Rays blog is here Don't Throw a 1 Lees is here BigLee's 'Miniature Adventures' I will be returning in a week or so with a further exciting update on the German Raid on the Isle of Wight in WW2 with Paul Thompson. Looking forward to that. Regards Ken The Yarkshire Gamer

Deep in the abyss where ancient creatures lurk, a motley crew must unite onboard the S.S. Thresher submarine to explore the abandoned R√°n Boer station resting in the oceanвАЩs unforgiving depths. Battling claustrophobia, paranoia, lurking behemoths, and hidden horrors, only one thing is certain; from the deep, power rises... ¬† Learn more about Thresher at http://critrole.com/thresher ¬† Meet the Cast! title: GTA 6: Why PS5 Pro Should Be the Best Way To Play
summary: Welcome back to Next-Gen Console Watch! This week Daemon is joined by Podcast Unlocked's Ryan McCaffrey and IGN's Executive Tech Editor, Bo Moore, to talk GTA 6's influence on the PS5 Pro. Will Sony's latest Pro console get a bump in sales because of GTA 6, considering it'll be the best way to play the game until the inevitable PC release? And we take a look at Microsoft's new pricing strategy for the Xbox Series X and S and all the accessories. The strategy: everything costs more now. And, will PlayStation follow suit and raise prices on their hardware? They've done it in other markets, will the U.S. be next? Plus we have last week's poll results, and a new poll for you to vote on at IGN.com. And don't forget to join us for IGN's second annual IGN Live, a huge in-person event held in Downtown Los Angeles. You can get tickets at IGN.com/Live and use promo code NGCW for a discount.

title: Patron Tournament 2025: Round 1 Game 3
podcast_name: Quiz Quiz Bang Bang Trivia Podcast
summary: On Today's Patron Trivia Tournament: We are excited for Game 3 of Round 1 of the Patron Tournament! We have the amazing Charla and Robert as the Texas Florida Line vs the fantastic Nolan and Jeff as Garden State Cheesery. They will be challenged with tricky questions like: Which U.S. state capital was named after an English explorer who was imprisoned in the Tower of London three times? Greek goddess Hera had the hundred eyes of her dead servant Argus preserved forever in a notable feature of which animal? Which 1947 film, with sequences filmed live during the 1946 Macy's Thanksgiving Parade, was initially released with the title The Big Heart in the UK? Manfred Mann's 1977 hit Blinded by the Light was originally written and recorded by whom, a real boss move at the time? Shockingly not a spokesperson for Denny's, in 1999 Fernando Tatis Sr. became the only player in MLB history to do what twice during a single inning? If you liked this episode, check out our last trivia episode! title: 38: The Badab War Part 6 | Warhammer 40K Lore
summary: CLICK HERE TO VOTE FOR YOUR FAV CHAPTER NAME! In this, our final episode on the Badab War, we start with the trials of the secessionist chapters, in a special consistorial court, and look at those who vouch for and against the Lamenters, Executioners, and Mantis Warriors. The Astral Claws receive the harshest sentence when their many crimes against the Imperium and the Codex Astartes are laid bare. We discuss how the various loyalist chapters are rewarded for their efforts with both the Star Phantoms and Fire Hawks taking governorships over sectors within the Maelstrom Zone and the Minotaurs retaining the bulk of Lamenters' materiel and vehicles. We close out with the dark fate of the Tranquillity system at the hands of the Carcharodons, the Edict of Obliteration enacted by Inquisitor Legate Frain, and the rise of a new threat within the Maelstrom; the Red Corsairs. вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Show notesвБ†¬†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ† вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†PatreonвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ† вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†MerchandiseвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ† вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Quartermaster¬†вБ† вБ†вБ†Listen Ad-FreeвБ†

title: Class Freedom, Leveling Tips, and PvP Strategies for World of Warcraft Players
podcast_name: Pig & Whistle Tales - A World of Warcraft Podcast
summary: Praises or critics can be send here! Also if there's anything you wish to hear about please send your requests here! We dive into the possibility of Blizzard removing race-class restrictions, examining ways that lore could support combinations like Night Elf Paladins and Undead Light-wielders. Our discussion expands to provide guidance for new subscribers on the best expansion content for leveling and class recommendations for PvP beginners. вАҐ Strong case for removing all race-class restrictions in coming expansions вАҐ Lore justifications for previously forbidden combinations through years of faction cooperation вАҐ Legion offers the best overall leveling experience with rich storylines and good dungeon design вАҐ Wrath of the Lich King provides efficient leveling with quick quest completion вАҐ Avoid Battle for Azeroth and Shadowlands for new player leveling due to tedious introductions вАҐ Upcoming Lorewalker content will highlight important storylines like Arthas and Xalatath вАҐ BM Hunter and Fury Warrior are the most beginner-friendly classes for PvP content вАҐ Retribution Paladin offers simple damage rotation but requires complex utility management Find us on social media and check out our Etsy shop with links below! Hope you all enjoy and hope you relate to any of these stories. And I will speak to you all in the next episode! title: From Glitches to Glory вАУ How WWE 2K25 Bounced Back | Best Gaming Podcast
summary: This week, weвАЩre diving headfirst into the ring with WWE 2K25. After the disaster that was 2K20 and the steady climb back with the last few games, the big question is: Did 2K25 finally nail it? Or is it another mid-carder hanging out in catering? WeвАЩre breaking down everythingвАФfrom gameplay tweaks that actually matter (better striking, smoother grapples, and finally a reversal system that makes sense), to new features like Super Finishers and Paybacks that shake up how matches feel. WeвАЩll also talk game modes (MyRISE, MyGM, Universe, Creation Suite), graphics, sound, bugs (donвАЩt worry, itвАЩs not 2K20-level broken), and yeahвА¶ microtransactions. Are they tolerable or still annoying? Whether you're a longtime fan or just curious about this year's entry, IвАЩve got thoughts. Lots of them.

title: Critical Encounters - Issue 269 - Secret Dossier - Mother's Day - Phoenix
podcast_name: Critical Encounters - A Marvel Champions Podcast
summary: Welcome to Issue 269 of Critical Encounters, a podcast about Marvel Champions, a Living Card Game by Fantasy Flight Games. Here we take a good look at that most critical piece of the game, the Encounter Sets. WeвАЩll discuss those poorly understood characters, unfairly labeled Villains, and their various plans to shape humanity and benefit the planet, as well as those so-called heroes intent on thwarting them.  In this very speical Mother's Day Secert Dossier Issue we take a look at a bunch of moms we have in the game along with the Omega Level Momster - Jean Grey. title: Episode 335: The Anarchy, Blood on the Clocktower, Compile
summary: In this jam-packed episode, Conor takes the reins as host and is joined by Adrian and Joe to chat about what theyвАЩve been playing, some solo deep-dives, party chaos, and emerging favourites. Joe's Long Weekend of Mayhem Joe dives into his recent experience playing Blood on the Clocktower over a long weekend with friends. Expect stories of bluffing, betrayal, and late-night accusations as he shares how this social deduction classic went down with his groupвАФand whether any friendships survived the chaos! Conor Compiles... and Compiles Again Conor has been putting in serious time with Compile, getting in multiple plays of this clever and compact card game. He shares his thoughts on how it holds up after repeated plays, where it shines, and whether itвАЩs earned a permanent spot in his rotation. Adrian Goes Solo with The Anarchy Adrian has been digging deep into The Anarchy, especially in solo mode. He breaks down how the game works, what makes it stand out mechanically, and why itвАЩs kept him coming back to the table. If youвАЩre a solo gamer or a fan of crunchy historical themes, this oneвАЩs for you. title: Weitz Cooking in Tarkir - Episode 425
summary: Weitz Cooking in Tarkir | A Conversation with TDM Limited Design Lead Welcome to Lords of Limited, the podcast dedicated to getting you better at drafting in Magic: the Gathering. This week, weвАЩre joined by the limited design lead for Tarkir Dragonstorm, Ben Weitz. Ben takes us through the evolution of the format from Vision Design all the way through the card file final submission. Hear what heвАЩs most proud of, whatвАЩs surprised him the most since the setвАЩs release, and if there are any gems yet to be discovered by the limited community! рЯОЩпЄП What YouвАЩll Get in This Episode: -Behind the Scenes Look at Set Design -The Goals of Tarkir Dragonstorm Limited -Card Design Evolution Stories This interview is an amazing look at what goes into designing the game we love and how design intention matches up with the results once a format is released to the general public. title: BONUS EPISODE: Charity Stream 2025
podcast_name: Greetings Adventurers - Dungeons and Dragons 5e Actual Play
summary: Four unlikely heroes are drawn by the siren song of fame and fortune to complete a simple rescue mission. No one knows what is down in the dungeon. No one knows what happened to the adventurers who entered and were never seen again. This is why we call in the professionals. Or at least the mercs who are greedy enough. This special episode was done for the annual 24-hour charity stream that took place on April 26-27, 2025! The 24 hour event raised money for¬†The Trevor Project.¬†The Trevor Project¬†is the leading national organization providing crisis intervention and suicide prevention services to lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer & questioning (LGBTQ) young people under 25.¬†You can find out more about this amazing organization on their website¬†www.thetrevorproject.org. The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro.¬†DonвАЩt forget to follow our editor David Stewart!¬† Want the world to see your fan art? title: Big Xbox Price Hikes, Doom The Dark Ages Path Tracing, Far Cry 4 60FPS!
summary: Microsoft's astonishing price hikes for Xbox Series consoles dominate the discussion this week, before Rich, John and Alex move on to discussing topics as diverse as Doom: The Dark Age's path tracing, Far Cry 4's 60FPS update, along with RTX 5070 Super and 5080 Super rumours. Meanwhile, Alex gets to grips with Oblivion Remastered PC anti-stutter "mods", trying to figure out if any of them work. title: Feats of Strength and Humor
summary: In this introductory episode, we meet our crew at a celebration in the shining city of Skisland. Svetlana, a ridgeborn firbolg cleric played by mrstoomuch, helps Yriel, a wanderborn goblin ranger played by @jenittowinit.bsky.social, with a little overindulgence problem. Maz, a seaborne faerie guardian played by @teecha.bsky.social meets up with them for some fried food and they notice Hilo, a seaborne clank bard played by @rianth.bsky.social, take a special interest in Yriel's sandcat Pazu. As they indulge in the delicious food, they notice Bogha-Froise, a seaborne ribbit sorcerer played by @olympuslives.bsky.social watching them.¬† The rest, as they say, is history. The Naturolls is an ongoing Daggerheart TTRPG actual play podcast. In this episode, recorded nearly 1 year ago, we're on the Daggerheart playtest rules. Join us as we start our journey in The Shatterlands.

title: Console Pre-orders Are Still a Disaster
summary: Welcome back to Next-Gen Console Watch! The Nintendo Switch 2 officially went up for preorder in the United States last week, and it went about as well as one might expect considering it's the follow-up to one of the best-selling gaming consoles of all time. Websites crasheds, credit card charges were declined, launch day deliveries were missedвАФit was chaos. Although many prevailed in securing a Switch 2 preorder, it wasn't easy; why hasn't the games industry learned from this? Why aren't retailers like Best Buy and Walmart better prepared for big consumer-focused moments? Should console manufacturers just bypass third-party retailers and sell directly to consumers? Plus we have last week's poll and a new poll for you to vote on at IGN.com. And don't forget to secure your tickets to IGN Live! Our big in-person event is returning to Los Angeles June 7-8, after a major turnout last year. Visit IGN.com/Live for details and tickets.
